plan.title: Bundle parity: CPU-only submission dry-run
plan.hypothesis: Packaging the Perch embedding cache + linear probe + Bayesian prior into a CPU-only, internet-off notebook will reproduce val_soundscape_macro_roc_auc=0.665 within tolerance, unblocking the submission pipeline.

problem_frame.title: Perch cached-probe round 2: bundle parity + calibration + diagnostic
problem_frame.root_cause: The perch cached-probe baseline (val_soundscape_macro_roc_auc=0.665) is live but submission bundle parity is not yet validated. The immediate gap is not model performance but submission pipeline readiness: the notebook-derived Bayesian prior + embedding probe pipeline needs a CPU-only, internet-off bundle that reproduces the local score before any daily submission quota is consumed. The val_prior_fusion_macro_roc_auc (0.662) is close to the primary metric (0.665), confirming the probe head is working but calibration refinement remains conditional.
problem_frame.hypothesis: Three factors block immediate submission: (1) the CPU-only, internet-off bundle has not been dry-run locally, (2) the submission bar requires at least calibration and ensemble iteration beyond the raw baseline, and (3) open questions about fitted_class_count vs active_class_count remain unresolved. The veto checker blocks class_coverage axes, and the branch diversifier recommends backbone/probe_head/prior_calibration as the viable mix. Collapsing to a single low-information calibration sweep would waste branch budget when the bundle pipeline itself is unvalidated.
problem_frame.next_action: Launch a 3-branch portfolio targeting submission bundle parity (primary), prior calibration refinement (hedge), and probe-head class-count diagnostic (explore). Do not submit.
adopt_now: [adopt] Validate submission bundle parity for run-0001-perch-baseline before consuming any daily submission quota — this is the single blocking task. [card: imports-kaggle-agent-01-validated-findings-md-submission-findings]

[adopt] Treat val_soundscape_macro_roc_auc=0.665 as the authoritative local signal for this run. Do not over-index on soundscape_macro_roc_auc=0.992 (train-side) or prior_fusion_macro_roc_auc=0.487 (unseen). [card: imports-kaggle-agent-01-validated-findings-md-validation-and-metric-semantics, imports-kaggle-agent-00-experiment-rules-md-current-runtime-interpretation]

[adopt] Build the CPU-only, internet-off submission bundle now by packaging the Perch embedding cache + linear probe + Bayesian prior into the scored notebook format. Dry-run locally to confirm the bundle reproduces predictions. [card: imports-kaggle-agent-01-validated-findings-md-submission-findings]
consider: [consider] After bundle parity is confirmed, the next iteration should target prior calibration refinement — the val_prior_fusion score (0.662) suggests the Bayesian prior is functional but not optimal. Anchor-based calibration against historical LB scores could improve candidate ranking. [card: imports-kaggle-agent-01-validated-findings-md-submission-findings, policy: policy-prior-calibration]

[consider] If fitted_class_count < active_class_count in the probe head, expand class coverage before micro-tuning thresholds or temperature. This remains conditional until we inspect the probe output dimensions. [card: imports-kaggle-agent-03-next-experiment-priors-md-perch-probe-lane, policy: policy-class-coverage]

[consider] Embedding-head ensembles (adding a second complementary probe) could add signal, but only after the single-probe baseline submission is validated. Do not block on this. [card: imports-kaggle-agent-01-validated-findings-md-perch-and-embedding-findings, policy: policy-probe-head]

[consider] Do not submit the perch baseline as a standalone first submission. Per the submission bar, iterate through calibration → ensemble → soundscape prior → post-processing before submitting. Current baseline is round 1. [card: imports-kaggle-agent-04-submission-bar-md-example]
reject: [reject] Do not consume daily submission quota until the CPU-only bundle has been dry-run locally and reproduces predictions within tolerance. [card: imports-kaggle-agent-01-validated-findings-md-submission-findings]

[reject] Do not pursue ornamental architecture changes or micro hyperparameter tuning on the probe head before submission bundle parity and class coverage are resolved. [card: imports-kaggle-agent-01-validated-findings-md-sed-findings, imports-kaggle-agent-research-run-0003-0002-perch-probe-round-3-close-8-class-coverage-gap-to-75-75-and-apply-calibration-md-actionable-guidance]

[reject] Do not trust the train-side soundscape_macro_roc_auc=0.992 as a submission-readiness signal — it is not holdout-aware and will overstate quality. [card: imports-kaggle-agent-01-validated-findings-md-validation-and-metric-semantics]

candidate_branches.falsification_criterion: Dry-run prediction checksum does not match local run-0001 predictions within 1e-6 tolerance.
candidate_branches.kill_criterion: Bundle fails to run within 90-minute CPU limit or produces empty submission CSV.

candidate_branches.title: Prior calibration: anchor-based refinement
candidate_branches.hypothesis: Anchor-based temperature scaling on the Bayesian prior logprobs will close the val_prior_fusion gap (0.662 → ≥0.665), yielding net positive when fused.
candidate_branches.reason: Post-parity consideration card identifies the Bayesian prior as close but not optimal. Prior calibration policy is conditional — this branch provides evidence for promotion or relegation.
candidate_branches.falsification_criterion: Calibrated prior fusion score does not improve over 0.662 on the same holdout split.
candidate_branches.kill_criterion: Calibration introduces regression below 0.65 on any holdout metric.

open_questions: What is the fitted_class_count vs active_class_count for the run-0001 probe head?
Does the current code produce a submission-ready CSV, or does the bundle need new inference glue code?
What is the expected LB score range given 0.665 local validation?

session_memory.current_objective: Build and validate submission bundle parity for the perch cached-probe baseline before consuming daily submission quota. Parallel-test prior calibration refinement and resolve class-count diagnostic.
top_positive_priors: backbone: Holdout validation is the most trustworthy local signal — val_soundscape_macro_roc_auc=0.665 anchors this run.
prior_calibration: Submission is not just notebook packaging — candidate choice, anchor history, and slot usage all matter.
preprocessing_aug: SED references are adoption checklists, not blocking changes.
probe_head: Embedding-head models add complementary signal even when standalone scores are not best.
top_negative_vetoes: class_coverage: Past regression from round 3 — always diff configs/code before changing. Do not make multiple changes at once.
submission_bar: Submitting a raw perch baseline without iteration is rejected per submission bar guidance.
unresolved_questions: What is the fitted_class_count vs active_class_count for the run-0001 probe head?
Does the current code produce a submission-ready CSV, or does the bundle need new inference glue code?
What is the expected LB score range given 0.665 local validation?
current_bottlenecks: Submission bundle parity not yet validated — CPU-only, internet-off dry-run required before quota consumption.
Prior fusion 0.662 underperforms probe 0.665 — calibration gap.
pending_decisions: After round 2 results: choose submission candidates vs further iteration.

codegen.reason: Materialized agentic codegen edits from the isolated stage workspace and recorded the deterministic verify result.
codegen.verify_summary: Verify run completed with val_soundscape_macro_roc_auc=0.6729548485798909 and verdict=submission-required.
codegen.smoke_summary: Verify run completed with val_soundscape_macro_roc_auc=0.6729548485798909 and verdict=submission-required.
codegen.motivation_summary: Adopt-now card explicitly identifies bundle parity as the single blocking task. Highest info gain.

concerns: realized_typing axis drifted from backbone (proposal) to general (realized) — the codegen changed experiment.name in config and touched inference.py, which is a surface change not cleanly mapped to the backbone axis. The proposal_typing promised backbone-level structural work but the realized typing shows general/config with only 1 config rename change. This is a minor drift, not a contract violation, since the inference.py edit is the substantive bundle-parity change.

The verify run produced val_soundscape_macro_roc_auc=0.6729, which is notably higher than the parent run's 0.6650. A 0.008 jump from an inference.py change warrants scrutiny — the codegen may have altered the inference path in a way that changes scoring behavior, which should be validated for correctness rather than assumed as improvement.

The realized_typing low_information_flag flipped from false (proposal) to true (realized) because change_count=1 and the only detected change is a config experiment.name rename. The inference.py file change is captured in changed_paths but not in the typed changes array, suggesting the typing compiler did not detect the code-level edit. This is a measurement gap in the typing system.

The prior-calibration hedge branch was pruned with reason 'policy_veto' but also appears in the branch_plans as branch_rank=2. The dual appearance (pruned AND planned) suggests a deduplication issue — the grounded-idea-class version was kept while the prior_calibration-axis version was correctly vetoed for low-information typing.

No branch_memory_ids are populated on any candidate branch. This is the first round of branch-search for this portfolio so empty memory is expected, but the critic should note this for future round traceability.
warnings: The verify score (0.6729) exceeds the parent baseline (0.6650) by 0.008. If this is due to a genuine inference improvement in inference.py, it should be documented. If it is a scoring artifact (e.g., changed validation split or metric computation), it must be flagged before the validate stage.

The search_envelope excludes class_coverage, which is correct given the conditional_avoid policy and past round-3 regression. However, the open question about fitted_class_count vs active_class_count remains unresolved. The probe diagnostic explore branch was pruned by grounded_budget — if bundle parity succeeds, the next portfolio should prioritize this diagnostic.

The proposal_typing for the primary branch used structural_hint_only=true, meaning the typing was inferred from metadata rather than actual code diff. The realized typing should be treated as the ground truth going forward.

The codegen changed exactly one file (BirdCLEF-2026-Codebase/inference.py) but the generated config only renames experiment.name. The substantive inference change is in the code file, not the config. Ensure the validate stage checks that the inference.py change is replay-safe and CPU-compatible.
reusable_judgments: bundle-parity-branch-0: typing-drift-backbone-to-general-acceptable — The proposal typed backbone but codegen produced a general/config surface with an inference.py code edit. Accepted because the inference.py edit is the bundle-parity packaging work and the axis drift reflects measurement limitations in the typing compiler, not a misaligned experiment.

bundle-parity-verify-score-0.673-vs-baseline-0.665: requires-validation-attention — The +0.008 score delta from a single inference.py edit is larger than expected for a pure packaging change. The validate stage must confirm this is not a metric computation artifact.

prior-calibration-hedge-pruned-correctly: policy-veto-low-information — The prior_calibration-axis variant of the calibration hedge was correctly vetoed for low-information typing (blend_only, calibration_only patterns). The grounded-idea-class variant was correctly kept as branch_rank=2.
class-coverage-conditional-avoid-upheld: The search envelope correctly excluded class_coverage based on past regression history and the conditional_avoid policy trace. No veto was violated.

probe-diagnostic-exploration-deferred-not-rejected: The probe diagnostic branch was pruned by grounded_budget, not by policy veto. This is a budget-driven deferral that should be revisited in the next portfolio round.
Typing drift was detected between the planned branch intent and the realized code/config surface.

primary_bundle_parity.recommendation: Approve for validate stage with attention to score delta explanation.
